home.metaDescription: Wing Chun, kids kung fu, self-defence and sanda in {city}. First class free, all levels, qualified instructors.
home.heroTitle: Learn to defend yourself. For real.
home.heroSubtitle: Wing Chun, kids kung fu, self-defence and sanda — in a gym where people come to train seriously, with no showmanship and no judgement.
home.aboutBody: Chun Wah is a neighbourhood academy built on one idea: a martial art is only worth something if it works under pressure. We teach principles before flourishes, everyone progresses at their own pace, and you are welcome whether you are 8 or 58. Beginners welcome all year round.
home.videosIntro: A few clips from our classes, demos and events — get a feel for the room before you step in.
home.programsTitle: Find the discipline that fits you
home.programsIntro: Five programmes, one mindset: solid technique, serious coaching, a healthy room.
home.why1Body: Small enough for the instructor to correct every student, big enough to find varied partners.
home.why2Body: A clear syllabus per level with regular gradings: you always know where you stand.
home.why3Body: Sparring is progressive and supervised. We train hard, never at a partner's expense.
home.scheduleTitle: A slot that fits your week
home.scheduleIntro: Evening classes Monday to Friday, mornings on Saturday.
home.ctaTitle: Your first class is on us
home.ctaBody: Come and try, no commitment. Lend us ninety minutes and we will take care of the rest.

trial.intro: Fill in this form and we will confirm your slot on WhatsApp the same day.
trial.step1: Pick a class that appeals to you
trial.step2: Turn up in sportswear — we lend you the rest
trial.step3: If you enjoy it, we talk membership. If not, no hard feelings.

trial.formNote: Submitting this form opens a WhatsApp conversation with the academy. No data is stored on this site.
